name: codex-sync-kit
description: Sync selected Codex setup files to a private GitHub vault and restore them on fresh installs.

interface.shortDescription: Sync Codex setup through a private GitHub vault.
interface.longDescription: Install a local CLI and Codex skill for scanning, snapshotting, pushing, pulling, and restoring selected Codex setup files.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-sync to scan my Codex setup.
Use $codex-sync to initialize my private vault.
Use $codex-sync to list my available snapshots.
